Dhurandhar The Revenge Trailer Out Now.  Book Now for Paid Previews on 18th March only.

Releasing worldwide on 19 March, on Gudi Padwa, Ugadi, and Eid.

A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE 

Written, Directed and Produced by Aditya Dhar
Produced by Jyoti Deshpande
Produced by Lokesh Dhar

Trailer Scored, Composed and Produced by Shashwat Sachdev

Score Producer Adam Lucas
Music Supervisor: Adarsh Vishwakarma

Director of Photography - Vikash Nowlakha

trending_videos.title: College GameDay
trending_videos.description: "College GameDay" gets fans ready for all the day's action in men's college basketball with exclusive interviews, analysis, behind-the-scenes features and predictions. The primary host is Rece Davis, joined by analysts Jay Bilas, Seth Greenberg and LaPhonso Ellis. The show typically originates from the site of one of the day's biggest games.

trending_videos.title: The Boys – Final Season Trailer | Prime Video
trending_videos.description:
The final trailer for the final season. Have a watch. Have a weep. Then strap the fuck in, because we're only a month away.

» Watch The Boys on Prime Video: https://amzn.to/2SQdfsv
» SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/PrimeVideoSubscribe

About The Boys:
THE BOYS is an irreverent take on what happens when superheroes, who are as popular as celebrities, as influential as politicians and as revered as Gods, abuse their superpowers rather than use them for good. It's the powerless against the super powerful as The Boys embark on a heroic quest to expose the truth about “The Seven,” and their formidable Vought backing.
 
About Prime Video:
Want to watch it now? We’ve got it. This week’s newest movies, last night’s TV shows, classic favorites, and more are available to stream instantly, plus all your videos are stored in Your Video Library. trailers_insight.trend: High interest in upcoming entertainment content, likely driven by the anticipation factor and fanbase engagement.

gaming_content.engagement_insight: Gaming content, specifically related to popular franchises like Resident Evil, continues to draw significant viewership.

diversity_of_channels.insight: A diverse range of creators, each contributing significantly to viewership, indicating that viewers are interested in a variety of content types and creator styles.

CoryxKenshin.channel_focus: Gaming, particularly engaging narratives and reactions.

entertainment.insight: High demand for trailers and teasers suggests a strong market for exclusive first looks and behind-the-scenes content.

gaming.insight: Continued interest in gaming narratives and walkthroughs, particularly around major franchise releases. Potential for collaboration with game developers for exclusive content.

news.insight: Opportunities to expand digital news offerings, especially in formats that engage younger audiences.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
